/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PreSolver.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libPreSolver.so -o libPreSolver.so "CMakeFiles/PreSolver.dir/pre-solver/PreSolver.C.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/abd-faiyaz/Files/tozoni-2016-implementation/build: libLagrangian.so -lm libSolverPLIGlpk.so
